audit_items.proof_trace: Implementation correctly incorporates blob parameters via XOR for epochs >= FuluForkEpoch (lines 582-589), matching EIP-7892 spec. Pre-Fulu epochs intentionally use base digest only (line 576 early return). FuluForkEpoch currently set to math.MaxUint64 (far future) on mainnet, so EIP-7892 logic not yet activated by design.
